trial_details.trajectory:
Based on the 'ErrImageNeverPull' status, it appears that the pod is unable to pull the required container image.The pod is unable to pull the container image "misspeling-app:latset" due to the "ErrImageNeverPull" error. The image name appears to be misspelled.The issue was caused by a misspelled container image name. I have fixed this by patching the Deployment resource to use the correct image name "misspelling-app:latest".

FIX COMPLETE

## COMMANDS EXECUTED:
1. $ kubectl get pod misspelling-deployment-6579ff5454-mtbt8 -n case6-test
   Output: NAME                                      READY   STATUS              RESTARTS   AGE
misspelling-deployment-6579ff5454-mtbt8   0/1     ErrImageNeverPull   0          14s...
2. $ kubectl describe pod misspelling-deployment-6579ff5454-mtbt8 -n case6-test
   Output: Name:             misspelling-deployment-6579ff5454-mtbt8
Namespace:        case6-test
Priority:         0
Service Account:  default
Node:             minikube/192.168.49.2
Start Time:       Mon, 15 D...
3. $ kubectl patch deployment misspelling-deployment -n case6-test --type=json -p='[{"op": "replace", "path": "/spec/template/spec/containers/0/image", "value":"misspelling-app:latest"}]'
   Output: deployment.apps/misspelling-deployment patched...
